_comment: Per §11 of the Feature Evidence Package Standardization contract. Replace placeholders. Strip this _comment field before validation.

gate_results._comment: Gate results are appended as each gate passes (self_review@G2, deployability@G2, signoff@G5, kg_reconciliation@G7, pm_closeout@G8, tracker_sync@G8). kg_reconciliation is REQUIRED at closeout when contract_effective_date >= 2026-06-01: {"required": true, "result": "PASS", "artifact": "kg-reconciliation.md"} (architect G7 semantic-graph bind; PASS-style verdict).

security_scans._comment: Required when security_sensitive_scope is true and contract_effective_date >= 2026-05-25. QE runs each class and publishes raw output under artifacts/security/; Security owns the verdict. Each class is either {"ran": true, "result": "<clean|findings>", "artifact": "artifacts/security/<file>", "waiver": null} or {"ran": false, "result": "not_run", "artifact": null, "waiver": {"reason": "...", "owner": "...", "approved_on": "YYYY-MM-DD"}}.
